title: [Demo] Starting DJing: What You Actually Need

title: [Demo] Choosing Your First DJ Equipment
description: A sample equipment guide covering beginner setups, headphones, monitors, and what not to overbuy too early.

description: A sample library workflow guide for folders, tags, playlists, backups, and keeping discoveries usable later.

title: [Demo] Preparing for Your First Public Performance
description: A sample performance checklist for nerves, timing, booth habits, backup plans, and listening to the room.
